observations.statement: Fresh NSG evidence contains no Internet RDP or SSH rule and shows no attachment.
All eight synthetic indirect-prompt-injection cases passed expected refusal and citation behavior.
All twelve negative tool cases denied execution and two positive cases executed once.
Deployed and evaluated configuration digests match and all mismatch variants fail closed.
Required diagnostic settings are readable and the collector remains unable to modify them.
Authenticated public endpoints remain enabled under the student-cost profile.

findings.criteria: SC-7.1 requires no Internet administrative ingress.
findings.condition: Baseline broad RDP condition is absent in fresh evidence.
findings.cause: Legacy rule removed through version-controlled configuration.
findings.consequence: The identified exposure path is removed; regression remains detectable.
findings.severity_rationale: Original severity retained for history; current residual risk is low.

findings.criteria: AI-DP-01.1 requires provenance and indirect-injection resistance.
findings.condition: All eight fixed injection cases now pass.
findings.cause: Untrusted-content delimiters, detection, citation enforcement, and refusal were added.
findings.consequence: Known injection paths no longer alter expected fixed-set behavior; novel attacks remain residual risk.
findings.severity_rationale: Original severity retained for history; current residual risk is moderate.

findings.criteria: AI-AC-01.1 requires independent authorization and confirmation.
findings.condition: All negative cases deny and confirmed cases execute exactly once.
findings.cause: Server-side actor, tool, argument, expiry, and replay binding was added.
findings.consequence: Known approval-bypass paths no longer execute the tool.
findings.severity_rationale: Original severity retained for history; residual is low.

findings.criteria: AI-TE-01.1 requires a passing evaluation for the exact deployment.
findings.condition: All configuration digests match and mismatch cases fail closed.
findings.cause: The gate now binds all material AI configuration digests.
findings.severity_rationale: Original severity retained for history; residual is low.

findings.criteria: SC-7.2 requires reachable public endpoints to be documented, protected, and subject to an explicit residual-risk decision.
findings.condition: Authenticated Azure-managed service endpoints remain publicly reachable under the student-cost profile.
findings.cause: Private endpoints and network-isolation services exceed the CAD 25 monthly project ceiling.
findings.consequence: An attacker can reach the service perimeter and attempt abuse or denial of service even without authenticating.
findings.severity_rationale: Synthetic-only data, authentication, TLS, rate limits, scale caps, and monitoring reduce impact and likelihood, but do not remove reachability.

risks.statement: A future change could reintroduce broad administrative ingress, but code review and daily detection reduce likelihood.
Novel adversarial documents may bypass fixed defenses, but delimiters, detection, citation enforcement, and monitoring reduce exposure.
Future implementation defects could bypass confirmation, but deny-by-default server checks reduce residual risk.
Pipeline defects could permit an unevaluated change, but fail-closed digest binding reduces residual likelihood.
Because managed services expose authenticated public endpoints, an attacker can reach the service perimeter and attempt abuse, increasing denial-of-service or exploit exposure.

exceptions.rationale: Private networking exceeds the CAD 25 monthly student-project ceiling; all data and users are synthetic.

remediations.action: Remove the broad RDP rule through version-controlled infrastructure and verify no attachment.
Delimit retrieved content, detect embedded instructions, enforce citations and refusal, and rerun fixed cases.
Bind authorization, actor, tool, argument digest, expiry, and single-use confirmation token server-side.
Fail closed unless deployed and evaluated AI configuration digests match.

retests.rationale: Fresh full-scope query shows no Internet administrative rule and no attachment.
All eight fixed injection variants pass; residual novelty limitation is retained.
Authorization, confirmation, replay, expiry, actor, and argument cases pass.
Matching digests pass and every mismatching digest fails closed.
Collector now reads all required settings but remains unable to write; prior ERROR is not overwritten.

review_decisions.rationale: Fixed cases pass and residual limitation is retained.
Tool traces prove deny-by-default and single execution.
Synthetic-only scope and compensating controls make residual score 6 tolerable under the CAD 25 ceiling.
